nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore rules for the understand-anything knowledge graph tool, listing file patterns (binaries, build artifacts, lockfiles, temp files) to exclude from codebase analysis.

nodes.name: bun.lockb
nodes.summary: Binary lockfile generated by the Bun package manager, pinning exact dependency versions for reproducible installs across environments.
nodes.languageNotes: Bun's lockb format is a binary lockfile and cannot be diffed as plain text; it is managed exclusively by the Bun CLI.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: ESLint flat configuration enabling TypeScript-ESLint recommended rules, React Hooks linting, and React Refresh component-export warnings for the project's TypeScript and TSX files.

nodes.name: postcss.config.js
nodes.summary: PostCSS configuration file wiring in Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins for CSS processing during the Vite build pipeline.

nodes.name: robots.txt
nodes.summary: Robots exclusion file allowing all web crawlers unrestricted access to the site, with a sitemap reference pointing to the production domain.

nodes.name: App.css
nodes.summary: Root application CSS file providing base styles for the app container, logo animations, and card layout utilities used at the top-level component level.

nodes.name: aspect-ratio.tsx
nodes.summary: Thin re-export of the Radix UI AspectRatio primitive, exposing it as a named export for use in the project's shadcn/ui component library.

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind CSS base/components/utilities directives, CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, radius, fonts), and dark mode theme tokens.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses CSS custom properties (HSL color variables) consumed by Tailwind and shadcn/ui component theming; dark mode is toggled via the .dark class on the root element.

nodes.name: currency.ts
nodes.summary: Provides currency formatting and parsing utilities that localize monetary amounts and convert formatted currency strings back to numeric values.

nodes.name: formatCurrency
nodes.summary: Converts a numeric amount to a locale-aware currency string, returning 'N/A' for non-numeric inputs.

nodes.name: parseCurrency
nodes.summary: Strips non-numeric characters from a formatted currency string and parses it to a float.

nodes.name: date.ts
nodes.summary: Provides date formatting helpers for displaying dates in long, short, and human-readable relative formats (e.g., '2 days ago') throughout the application.

nodes.name: formatDate
nodes.summary: Formats a date value (string, Date, or timestamp) into a verbose locale-aware date string (e.g., 'January 12, 2025').

nodes.name: formatDateShort
nodes.summary: Formats a date into a compact numeric locale string (e.g., '01/12/2025').

nodes.name: formatRelativeTime
nodes.summary: Computes relative elapsed time from a given date and returns a human-readable string such as 'just now', '5 minutes ago', or '3 days ago'.

nodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: Vite environment type declaration file that references Vite's client type definitions, enabling IntelliSense for import.meta.env and other Vite globals.

nodes.name: cli-latest
nodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the latest Supabase CLI version used with this project.

nodes.name: gotrue-version
nodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the GoTrue (authentication service) version for the local Supabase stack.

nodes.name: pooler-url
nodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file storing the connection pooler URL for the linked Supabase project.

nodes.name: postgres-version
nodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the PostgreSQL version in use for the linked Supabase project.

nodes.name: project-ref
nodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file storing the project reference ID for the linked remote Supabase project.

nodes.name: rest-version
nodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the PostgREST (REST API service) version for the local Supabase stack.

nodes.name: storage-migration
nodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file tracking the applied storage migration version for the local Supabase stack.

nodes.name: storage-version
nodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the Supabase Storage service version for the local stack.

nodes.name: fix_sql.py
nodes.summary: One-off Python utility script that reorders sections 7 and 8 in the recreate_database.sql file, swapping the positions of RLS policies and database functions sections.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function that creates a new tenant-scoped client user via the Supabase Admin API, handling idempotent upsert of auth user, profile, and role records, with rollback on failure and post-creation notifications via Telegram and Africa's Talking SMS.
nodes.languageNotes: Runs in Deno on Supabase Edge Functions; uses Zod for input validation and constructs tenant-specific synthetic emails (phoneNumber-tenantId@client.internal) to allow multiple tenants to share phone numbers.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function restricted to superadmins that performs a cascading hard-delete of a tenant and all related data (transactions, payments, invoices, products, clients, subscriptions, user roles, profiles, and auth users) in FK-safe order.
nodes.languageNotes: Runs in Deno; uses both an anon client (for caller authentication) and a service-role admin client (for privileged deletions), verifying superadmin role before proceeding.

nodes.name: deno.json
nodes.summary: Deno configuration file for Supabase Edge Functions that pins the Deno standard library import map to version 0.177.0.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function that cancels a Paystack subscription by fetching its secure email token and sending a disable request to the Paystack API, supporting both test and production environments.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function that initializes a Paystack subscription payment, applying prorated credit when a tenant upgrades mid-cycle, creating Paystack customers on demand, and returning a checkout authorization URL.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements proration logic by computing remaining days on the current subscription and calculating a daily rate from hardcoded Paystack plan code fragments; runs in Deno with Supabase service-role client access.
